summary_sections.title: Key Concepts: Net Charge
summary_sections.content_html:
Core Concepts

  • Net Charge: Ionic compounds must be electrically neutral (total + charge = total - charge).
  • Cation Charges: Metals lose electrons; Group 1 → +1, Group 2 → +2, Group 13 → +3.
  • Anion Charges: Nonmetals gain electrons; Group 17 → -1, Group 16 → -2, Group 15 → -3.
  • Transition Metals: Can form multiple charges due to d electrons.
  • Balancing: Adjust subscripts so total positive charge equals total negative charge.
